---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Propose a new high-performance feature or creative brand capability"
title: "[FEAT]: <short title of the proposal>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## ✨ Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of what the user friction is. (e.g., *"I'm always frustrated when estimating campaigns because..."*)

## 💡 Describe the Proposed Enhancement
Describe the high-fidelity solution you would like added to the platform. Mention specific layouts, interactive states, animations, or styling details.

## 🎨 Describe the Visual Vibe & Typography
*   **Font Choice**: [e.g., Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono]
*   **Color Tone**: [e.g., slate grays, minimal light, deep cosmic darks]
*   **Animations**: Describe are there any entry motions or slide drawers?

## 🛠️ Proposed Technical Approach
Outline any design suggestions or database schemas (such as updating state variables inside `/src/types.ts` or mapping localized strings in the context provider).

## 🚀 Additional Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions, designs, or mockups you have evaluated before opening this feature request.
